model_specification_line: smf.wls('full_time ~ treatment * post + C(year) + C(statefip)', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit(cov_type='cluster', cov_kwds={'groups': df['statefip']})
sample_selection: citizen in [3, 4] (Not a US citizen — proxy for undocumented status)
yrimmig > 0 and yrimmig <= 2007 (Arrived in US by 2007 — proxy for continuous presence since June 15, 2007)
yrimmig - birthyr < 16 (Arrived before 16th birthday — DACA eligibility condition)
birthyr >= 1977 (Control group lower bound: age 31-35 as of June 15, 2012)
birthyr <= 1996 (Treatment group upper bound: at least age 17 in 2013)
year != 2012 (Exclude DACA rollout year; pre-period: 2006-2011, post-period: 2013-2016)
